chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُطَلِّقُ امْرَأَتَهُ ثُمَّ يَمُوتُ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَنْقَضِيَ عِدَّتُهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 47 – The man divorces his wife, then he dies before the fulfilment of her waiting period

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/206)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/206)

parts.text: عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى

text: رَجُلٍ كَانَتْ تَحْتَهُ امْرَأَةٌ فَطَلَّقَهَا ثُمَّ مَاتَ عَنْهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ تَنْقَضِيَ عِدَّتُهَا قَالَ تَعْتَدُّ أَبْعَدَ الْأَجَلَيْنِ عِدَّةَ الْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hisham Bin Salim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man under whom was a woman (wife), so he divorced her, then died from her before she had fulfilled her waiting period. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘She would observe the waiting period being the further of the two terms, a waiting period of the woman widowed from her husband’.
en.sarwar: 5. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hisham ibn Salim who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who divorces his wife and dies before the end of her waiting period. He (the Imam) said, ‘She must count her waiting period according to the longer of the two periods of time.’”
